name: Tranexamic Acid (TXA)
description: Walaxda Antifibrinolytic ee joojisa burburka xinjirowga dhiigga. Waxay si weyn u yaraynaysaa dhimashada shoogga dhiigbaxa marka hore loo bixiyo. Ay ku taliso CoTCCC dhammaan dhaawacyada leh dhiigbax weyn ama halis ugu jira dhiigbax weyn.
indications: Dhiigbax gudaha ah oo muuqda ama looga shakisan yahay
dose: 1g IV/IO in ka badan 10 daqiiqo, oo ay ku xigto 1g IV/IO in ka badan 8 saacadood. Haddii IV/IO aan la heli karin: 650mg PO x2 (1.3g wadarta) -- TCCC PO doorashada.
window: WAA in lagu maamulaa 3 saacadood gudahooda ka dib dhaawac. Wixii ka dambeeya 3 saacadood, TXA waxa laga yaabaa inay kordhiso dhimashada -- ha bixin.
contraindications: Xididdada Xididka Xididka Xididka Xididka Xididka ee La Faafiyay (DIC)
warnings: Log Time Time-ka isla markiiba -- daaqadu waa 3 saacadood wakhtiga dhaawaca, ma aha wakhtiga imaatinka.
Ha ku khaldin qiyaasta IV-ga (1g) iyo qiyaasta afka.

pediatric.dose: 15 mg/kg IV (ugu badnaan 1g). Caddeymo soo baxaya -- isticmaal xukun caafimaad.

obstetric.note: Lagu tilmaamay dhiigbaxa dhalmada ka dib. Badbaadada uurka. Isla qiyaas qaangaar ah ayaa khuseysa.

source: JTS CPG: Hemorrhage Control / CoTCCC TCCC Guidelines
